steps.title: Use the cause-and-effect clue
steps.content: The sentence says rising cassette prices had a counterintuitive effect: buyers entered the market because they expected prices to keep rising. The blank must mean that the price increase caused or brought about new demand.

steps.title: Pick the precise verb
steps.content: Choice A means taking advantage of something, Choice B focuses on making money from something, and Choice C means estimating value. Only one option means causing something to arise. The answer is D.
